Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I am unsure about your awareness of politique européenne, but you have to understand that Great Fen et France are sworn enemies. We would all rather die than feel the unseasoned soup-fingers of the Fennish intruding on our rights.

Line.Text: But Québec is a colony de France that lives controlled by a Fennish colony -- the most of the rest of Whisperfrost. Yet, while we overthrew our despots siècles ago, Québec is still refusing to make even an honest effort.
